title: Edge RUM Ingest Payload
description: Payload schema for edge-rum web SDK. Matches the EdgeTelemetryProcessor batch contract. The backend collector enriches each batch with tenant_id (derived from the API key) before forwarding to Kafka.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 batch flush time. Use new Date().toISOString(). Never Unix ms.

location.description: Optional per-app/install location string (City/Country). Set via EdgeRumConfig.location.

batch_size.description: Number of items in the events array. Server uses this as a sanity check.

events.description: Array of event and metric items. Server discriminates by item.type ('event' | 'metric').

eventName.description: Discriminator. Backend routes by this value. Web Vitals + long_task + resource_timing are emitted as 'metric' items (no eventName).

metric.description: Metric item. metricName and value live at the item root, NOT inside attributes. Produced by EdgeRum.time().end().

metricName.description: Web Vitals: 'LCP' | 'INP' | 'CLS' | 'FCP' | 'TTFB'. Custom timings from EdgeRum.time().end() use the caller-supplied name. Performance signals: 'long_task' | 'resource_timing' | 'frame_render_time' | 'memory_usage'.

attributes.description: Flat key-value object. All values must be primitives — no nested objects, no arrays. Context (app, device, session, user) merged here alongside event-specific fields.

app.package_name.description: App package / bundle ID. Required by the collector for identity resolution.

app.build_number.description: Native app build number. Omitted entirely when unknown — never sent as an empty string. Resolved synchronously from EdgeRumConfig.appBuild or asynchronously from @capacitor/app.

device.id.description: Persistent device identifier. Required by the collector. Format: device_{timestampMs}_{8hexchars}_{platform}.

network.type.description: Connection class. Preserved across the firewall — distinct from http.* attributes on http.request events.

session.sequence.description: Monotonic counter. Increments on each successfully sent payload.

session.is_first_session.description: True on the very first session ever created for this install (no prior total_sessions entry in storage). False once the user has had any prior session.

session.total_sessions.description: Cross-launch monotonic counter of total sessions seen for this install. Bumped at every SessionManager construction and on every startNewSession(). Persisted in localStorage; resets only if storage is cleared.

user.id.description: Required by the collector. SDK-owned anonymous ID until EdgeRum.identify() attaches details.

sdk.contract_version.description: Wire-contract version. The processor can log 'unknown contract' once per session if it doesn't recognize this value.

navigationAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: navigation. Marks the entry hop in a user journey.

screenDurationAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: screen.duration. Emitted on screen exit with the full dwell time.

screen.duration_ms.description: Now() - enteredAt at the moment of exit.

screen.exit_method.description: Free string. Currently always 'navigate'; future values may include 'back', 'background', 'close'.

http.url.description: Full URL with PII query params stripped.

http.status_code.description: 0 when the request never reached a response (DNS, abort, timeout).

http.success.description: True when 200 <= status < 400 and the request was not aborted.

sessionStartedAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: session.started. Emitted at SDK init, on foreground after a prior background within timeout (resumed), and on foreground after the 30-minute idle timeout (rotation).

sessionFinalizedAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: session.finalized. Emitted on every background, on pagehide/beforeunload (app close), and overrides context with the snapshot taken before any subsequent rotation. Flushes immediately. Includes a journey summary so the processor doesn't have to recompute counts from stored events.

session.id.description: The id of the session being closed — overrides context to lock the pre-rotation value.

session.visited_screens.description: Comma-separated list of navigation.to_screen values in visit order. Capped at 200 screens; trailing visits are dropped on overflow.

session.screen_count.description: Total number of navigation events emitted in the session (repeats included). Equals visited_screens.length.

session.event_count.description: Total number of events emitted in the session at finalize time, excluding the session.finalized event itself.

session.metric_count.description: Total number of metric items emitted in the session at finalize time.

session.journey_truncated.description: True if more than 200 screens were visited in this session and the journey list was capped. Trailing visits past the cap are dropped.

sdk.error_count.description: Count of internal SDK errors (broken instrumentation, capture exceptions, etc.) reported by the HealthMonitor during this session.

userInteractionAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: user.interaction. Emitted by the automatic InteractionCapture on click/tap. NO inner text is captured to avoid PII.

interaction.target_role.description: role attribute or aria-label fallback (truncated to 64 chars).

interaction.screen.description: Current route at time of interaction.

crashBreadcrumbAttributes.description: Extra attributes attached to app.crash events. crash.breadcrumbs is a JSON-string array (exception to flat-primitive purity).

crash.breadcrumbs.description: JSON.stringify of the last 20 user actions as { ts, type, name } objects. Backend parses to recover context leading up to the crash.

longTaskMetricAttributes.description: Extra attributes for metric items with metricName: 'long_task'. Value is duration_ms.

resourceTimingMetricAttributes.description: Extra attributes for metric items with metricName: 'resource_timing'. Value is duration_ms.

frameRenderTimeMetricAttributes.description: Extra attributes for metric items with metricName: 'frame_render_time'. Value is total frame interval in ms (one event per measured frame; default mode emits slow frames only — interval >= frameSlowThresholdMs). Attribute keys are dotless to match the EdgeTelemetryProcessor's frame-bucketing API.

frame_build_duration.description: Main-thread build slice in ms. WebView: derived from overlapping PerformanceObserver longtask entries (falls back to total when no overlap). iOS CADisplayLink: total. Android Choreographer: total. Never null.

frame_raster_duration.description: Raster slice in ms. 0 on iOS / Android when no separate raster signal is available. Never null.

frame_type.description: Frame category. WebView and CADisplayLink/Choreographer always emit 'ui'.

frame_dropped.description: True when the interval is >= 2x frameSlowThresholdMs (a missed vsync at 60Hz). Always boolean, never omitted.

metric.screen.description: Route at frame time. Retains the dotted prefix for parity with other metric.screen usage.

memoryUsageMetricAttributes.description: Extra attributes for metric items with metricName: 'memory_usage'. Value is megabytes at the top-level metric.value, NOT inside attributes. Attribute keys are dotless to match the EdgeTelemetryProcessor's memory-timeline API.

memory_pressure_level.description: OMITTED (not sent) when the platform exposes no pressure signal (Web). iOS: mapped from DISPATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_MEMORYPRESSURE. Android: mapped from ComponentCallbacks2.onTrimMemory.

memory_source.description: 'javascript' for the V8/JSC heap path, 'native' for the platform process memory.

userProfileUpdateAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: user.profile.update. Emitted by EdgeRum.identify() on each call. The processor uses these to populate / backfill rum_users.

user.profile_version.description: Monotonic counter incremented on each identify() call.

crashAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: app.crash. Catches both webview JS errors and native crashes (NSException / Throwable / Mach signals / NDK signals / ANRs / hangs).

crash.id.description: UUID assigned by the native bridge when the crash was persisted to disk.

crash.captured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the crash on the device. Distinct from event timestamp (which is when the SDK replayed it on next launch).

crash.signal.description: Mach / POSIX signal name when applicable.

crash.symbolication.description: Whether the backend needs to symbolicate raw addresses against uploaded debug symbols.

anr.duration_ms.description: Main-thread blocked duration on ANR/Hang causes.

crash.breadcrumbs.description: JSON-string array of last 20 user actions before the crash (see crashBreadcrumbAttributes).

metricAttributes.description: Extra attributes for type: metric items. Web Vitals (LCP/INP/CLS/FCP/TTFB) carry metric.unit, metric.rating, and metric.screen. Custom timings from EdgeRum.time() carry metric.unit: 'ms' plus any caller-supplied attributes. Performance signals (long_task, resource_timing, frame_render_time, memory_usage) carry their own attribute sets — see longTaskMetricAttributes, resourceTimingMetricAttributes, frameRenderTimeMetricAttributes, and memoryUsageMetricAttributes.

metric.screen.description: Route at the time the metric was captured (Web Vitals).

pageLoadAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: page_load — WEB ONLY.

networkChangeAttributes.description: Extra attributes for eventName: network_change — WEB ONLY.
